Cordyceps crassissima is a type of fungus, specifically a species of ascomycete that belongs to the genus Cordyceps.

The health benefits of Cordyceps crassissima include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which may help to improve physical performance, reduce fatigue, and enhance overall health.

The bioactive constituents of Cordyceps crassissima include cordycepin, polysaccharides, and other compounds with potential medicinal properties.

Cordyceps crassissima is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and is often combined with other herbs or used as a single ingredient supplement.
